prompt:
Goal: Create a clean flat anime key-visual poster for Kurenai, emphasizing bold graphic design rather than hyper-detailed rendering.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition, off-white background, crisp vector-like anime linework, limited palette of black, deep crimson red, pale skin tones, and muted gold accents.

Layout: Place the character large on the right two-thirds of the frame, cropped from mid-thigh upward, turned slightly left with a calm serious expression. Use a large tilted crimson rectangle behind her as the main geometric backdrop. Put the title typography on the left side: one very large red Japanese kanji 「紅」, the romanized word “KURENAI” below it, a small red flower icon with a thin horizontal line, and the tagline “HONOR IN SILENCE, BLADE IN BLOOM.” Add minimal UI-like red graphic bars in the lower left and a small vertical red tick-mark motif near the upper left edge.

Subject details: Depict exactly 1 anime woman with long black hair in a high ponytail, loose bangs framing her face, and red eyes. She wears a modern kunoichi/samurai-inspired black outfit: a sleeveless high-neck crop top, high-waisted black skirt or shorts with small gold hardware, red cord ties, and an off-shoulder black haori jacket draped around her arms. Add muted gold trims, buckles, rings, and floral embroidery on the sleeve. She carries exactly 1 katana at her left hip, with a black handle, red diamond wrap, and gold guard. Include exactly 2 long dangling earrings with red tassels and gold geometric shapes, and exactly 2 red hair ribbons tied into the ponytail.

Decorative elements: Include exactly 1 large red geometric rectangle behind the character, exactly 1 faint floral silhouette inside that rectangle, exactly 5 floating red petal shapes around the right and center area, exactly 1 small red flower icon under the title, exactly 1 lower-left horizontal red bar group, and exactly 1 upper-left vertical tick-mark motif.

Visual style: Flat anime illustration, sharp clean outlines, smooth cel shading, minimal gradients, elegant poster design, high contrast, restrained details, no painterly texture, no photorealism, no excessive background clutter. The mood should be poised, silent, refined, and dangerous.

Text content: Large kanji 「紅」, roman text “KURENAI”, and tagline HONOR IN SILENCE, BLADE IN BLOOM.. Keep all typography deep crimson, clean, and aligned on the left.

Constraints: Do not add extra characters, extra weapons, extra text blocks, or a detailed environment. Keep the composition airy with off-white negative space and a polished flat anime poster finish.
